past_challenges.raw: I transferred in sophomore year and felt completely disconnected from everyone around me. Everyone already had their friend groups and I had no idea how to break in. It took me a whole semester before I finally found my people through a coding club.

Joining clubs felt really intimidating at first because I was older than most of the freshmen and younger than the upperclassmen who already knew each other. I almost gave up after the first meeting but I'm glad I stuck around.
